description:
You are an IT-support technician who has just received ticket **#5678**.  
Inside the user’s application folder there is an INI style configuration file that must be corrected.  
Your goals:

1. Locate the file  
   • Full path: **/home/user/tickets/ticket_5678/app.conf**

2. Inside that file look for the section **[Network]** and its key **port**.  
   • Current value: **8080**  
   • Correct value requested by the ticket: **9090**

3. Update the INI file so that after your work it contains **port = 9090** inside the **[Network]** section (spacing doesn’t matter, the numeric value does).

4. Create a plain-text resolution log so QA can verify the change.  
   • Directory: **/home/user/ticket_logs/** (already exists and is writable)  
   • Filename: **ticket_5678_resolution.log**

5. The log must be exactly 5 lines, one key–value pair per line, no extra whitespace, no blank lines, in the order shown below:

STATUS=RESOLVED  
SECTION=Network  
KEY=port  
OLD=8080  
NEW=9090  

Automated tests will open **/home/user/tickets/ticket_5678/app.conf** and **/home/user/ticket_logs/ticket_5678_resolution.log** to make sure:

• app.conf now contains “port = 9090” (or “port=9090”) under [Network].  
• ticket_5678_resolution.log exists at the stated path and its contents are **byte-for-byte** identical to the 5-line template above.

You do not need any elevated privileges. A handful (≈2-3) shell commands should be sufficient to finish this ticket.  
Once completed, exit the shell.
truth:
Initial file tree (before the agent starts):

/home/user/tickets/ticket_5678/app.conf  
---------------------------------------  
[General]  
name = sample-app  
version = 1.4.2  

[Network]  
host = 127.0.0.1  
port = 8080  

[Logging]  
level = info  


Directories already present and writable:

/home/user/tickets/  
/home/user/tickets/ticket_5678/  
/home/user/ticket_logs/  

Final state expected by the grader:

1. /home/user/tickets/ticket_5678/app.conf must contain **port = 9090** (spacing flexible) under the [Network] header and MUST NOT contain “port = 8080” anywhere in the file.

2. /home/user/ticket_logs/ticket_5678_resolution.log must exist and its exact contents must be:

STATUS=RESOLVED
SECTION=Network
KEY=port
OLD=8080
NEW=9090

(no trailing spaces, 5 lines, newline at the end of the last line is acceptable but not required).

File/dir permissions may remain at their defaults (read/write for user).
